metadata.name: 專注飛鳥
metadata.description: 用EEG檢測專注力嘅訓練遊戲，飛鳥透過專注力高低控制升降食金幣

conversations.text: Initial game concept discussion: Focus Bird game where bird flies up when unfocused, down when focused to collect coins. Built as HTML/JS canvas game with keyboard simulation (↑/↓). Discussed EEG hardware options - recommended NeuroSky MindWave Mobile 2 (~HK00-600) as best choice for real device integration later.
Rule changes: bird starts center (200,250), Level 1=10 coins +5/level, max 20 levels, top = game over (no focusLevel requirement), space hint dialog auto-hides after 3 seconds. Deployed.

key_points: Level 1 = 10 coins, +5 per level, max 20 levels (Lv20 = 105 coins)
Reaching top = game over (no clamp, no focus condition)
Space hint dialog disappears 3s after game starts
pending_items: Connect real EEG device via Web Bluetooth
decisions: Start with keyboard simulation first, upgrade to hardware later
